query:
SELECT id, code, full_name FROM workers;
SELECT ae.id, ae.worker_id, ae.event_type, DATE_FORMAT(ae.event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as event_time, ae.method, ae.note FROM attendance_events ae ORDER BY ae.event_time ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT id, code, full_name FROM workers;
SELECT ae.id, ae.worker_id, ae.event_type, DATE_FORMAT(ae.event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as event_time, ae.method, ae.note FROM attendance_events ae ORDER BY ae.event_time ASC;
messages: id	worker_id	event_type	event_time	method	note
stdout:
